common_params.name: partner_id
common_params.description: Partner ID is assigned upon registration is successful. Required for all requests.

common_params.name: timestamp
common_params.description: This is to indicate the timestamp of the request. Required for all requests. Expires in 5 minutes.

common_params.name: access_token
common_params.description: The token for API access, using to identify your permission to the api. Valid for multiple use and expires in 4 hours.

common_params.name: shop_id
common_params.description: Shopee's unique identifier for a shop. Required param for most APIs.

common_params.name: sign
common_params.description: Signature generated by partner_id, api path, timestamp, access_token, shop_id and partner_key via HMAC-SHA256 hashing algorithm. More details: https://open.shopee.com/documents?module=87&type=2&id=58&version=2

define: Modify the selected product list in an existing target campaign

request_params.description: The list of items to be modified.
request_params.name: item_list

children.description: Commission rate of current item, 1.1 means 1.1%, support two decimal places.
children.name: rate

response_params.description: Indicate error type if hit error. Empty if no error happened.
response_params.name: error

response_params.description: Indicate error details if hit error. Empty if no error happened.
response_params.name: message
response_params.sample: Please agree to the AMS T&C in Seller Center - Affiliate Marketing Solutions first before using Open API.

response_params.name: request_id
response_params.description: The identifier for an API request for error tracking.

Successful elements will not be returned. 

If error and message are not empty, it means that all settings have failed. 

If error and message are empty, but fail_xx_list has content, it means that the element in the fail_xx_list setting failed and the rest were successful.

If error, message, fail_xx_list are all empty, it means that all settings are successful.
response_params.name: response

children.description: Indicate error type if hit error. Empty if no error happened.
children.name: fail_error

children.description: Indicate error details if hit error. Empty if no error happened.
children.name: fail_message

request_sample.value:
<?php

$curl = curl_init();

curl_setopt_array($curl, array(
  CURLOPT_URL => 'https://partner.shopeemobile.com/api/v2/ams/edit_product_list_of_targeted_campaign?access_token=access_token&partner_id=partner_id&shop_id=shop_id&sign=sign&timestamp=timestamp',
  CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER => true,
  CURLOPT_ENCODING => '',
  CURLOPT_MAXREDIRS => 10,
  CURLOPT_TIMEOUT => 0,
  CURLOPT_FOLLOWLOCATION => true,
  CURLOPT_HTTP_VERSION => CURL_HTTP_VERSION_1_1,
  CURLOPT_CUSTOMREQUEST => 'POST',
  CURLOPT_POSTFIELDS => '{
    "campaign_id": 101,
    "edit_type": "add",
    "item_list": [
        {
            "item_id": 101,
            "rate": 1.1
        }
    ]
}',
  CURLOPT_HTTPHEADER => array(
    'Content-Type: application/json'
  ),
));

$response = curl_exec($curl);

curl_close($curl);
echo $response;
